description: FGAP-074 C3 — migrate pi-workflows consumers (29 files). Largest consumer set: workflow-sdk, workflow-executor, step-block, step-shared, index, template-validation, test-helpers + ~22 tests, mostly importing writeBootstrapPointer / schemaPath / PROJECT_DIR. Repoint old project-* subpaths + renamed identifiers to context-* names. Green per commit.
acceptance_criteria: All 29 pi-workflows files repointed to ./context-* subpaths + renamed identifiers
PROJECT_DIR consumers updated to the C0-decided replacement (drop|rename)
No legacy project-* import string remains in pi-workflows
npm run build && check && test green
notes: Decomposition chunk C3. Maps to Claude task #62. FGAP-074. Parallelizable with C2/C4 but commit serially for green clarity (sequence note).
